title: hieracium melanops
side_effects: Hieracium melanops can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and digestive issues in some individuals. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant may lead to liver damage, kidney problems, and an increased risk of bleeding disorders. In rare cases, it may also cause hallucinations, anxiety, and changes in mood due to its psychoactive properties. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using Hieracium melanops for any health purposes to minimize the risk of adverse effects.
